tree.name: Xavier Tillman
tree.tradeDescription: Celtics traded Xavier Tillman and $3.5M cash to Hornets for a 2030 2nd-round pick (CHA own, top-55 protected). Deadline deal to help Boston get under luxury tax.
tree.note: Michigan State big, limited role in Boston (14 games, 7.9 mpg). CHA received Tillman + cash.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 2nd Round Pick (top-55 protected)
assetsGivenUp.note: Hornets' own 2030 2nd-round pick, top-55 protected, sent to Boston in Tillman trade
